description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, modern design with a large, low-pitched roof and an expansive front porch area. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees, flowering bushes, and manicured hedges, which frame a rectangular swimming pool with a ladder and poolside seating. The front driveway accommodates three cars, and the main entrance is shaded by the extended roof. The backyard area includes a pergola, outdoor seating, and a small play structure, enhancing the recreational appeal. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall layout is open and inviting, with a focus on leisure and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a wide roof, front porch, driveway, pool, and lush landscaping. Features include large windows, outdoor seating, and recreational amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with three cars, main entrance, wide porch, and landscaped garden with pool visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, palm trees, and the bungalow's extended roof, with the driveway and cars partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, poolside seating, pergola, and backyard landscaping, with the bungalow's back facade and windows visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the pool, play structure, lush trees, and the side of the bungalow with the driveway and cars in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
